settings.title: We Now Handle End-of-Tenancy Cleans
settings.excerpt: Moving out is stressful enough without scrubbing an oven at midnight, so we have built a service around getting deposits back.
settings.body:
Moving day is chaos, and the deep clean a landlord expects is the last thing anyone has energy for. So Sparkhaus now offers a dedicated end-of-tenancy service, built around one goal: getting your deposit back.

We work to the checklist most letting agents use: inside the oven, behind appliances, limescale off the bathroom, skirting boards, and the insides of every cupboard. These are exactly the spots inventory clerks check first, and the ones tenants run out of time for.

What the clean covers

  • Inside the oven, hob, and extractor
  • Behind and beneath movable appliances
  • Limescale, grout, and sealant in bathrooms
  • Skirting boards, doorframes, and inside every cupboard

You get an itemised list of what we cleaned, which is exactly the kind of evidence that helps when a deposit is in question. If a clerk queries anything, you have a dated record of the work, room by room, to set against their report.

A practical tip: book us for the day after your furniture leaves, not before. An empty property cleans far better and far faster, with nothing to work around, and there is no risk of the movers scuffing a floor we have just done.

Hand back a property that gives the agent nothing to argue with. In our experience, a clean that matches the move-in inventory is the single biggest factor in a deposit coming back in full.
